Package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp

package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp
Juneau @Marshalled types for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) wire format.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.bean
    Data Transfer Objects
  • Class
    Description
    BlobResourceContents
    Base64 blob body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
    CallToolRequest
    Parameters for "tools/call".
    CallToolResult
    Result payload for "tools/call".
    ClientCapabilities
    MCP client capability advertisement in InitializeRequest.
    Content
    Polymorphic MCP content block (tool results, prompt messages).
    EmbeddedResourceContent
    MCP resource content block (inline resource body).
    GetPromptRequest
    Parameters for "prompts/get".
    GetPromptResult
    Result payload for "prompts/get".
    ImageContent
    MCP image content block (base64 data).
    Implementation
    MCP Implementation object (name / version).
    InitializeRequest
    MCP initialize request parameters.
    InitializeResult
    MCP initialize result payload.
    JsonRpcError
    JSON-RPC 2.0 error object.
    JsonRpcRequest
    JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope.
    JsonRpcResponse
    JSON-RPC 2.0 success or error response envelope.
    JsonSchema
    JSON Schema subset used by MCP tool inputSchema objects.
    ListPromptsResult
    Result payload for "prompts/list".
    ListResourcesResult
    Result payload for "resources/list".
    ListToolsResult
    Result payload for "tools/list".
    LoggingCapability
    Server logging capability marker (structure may grow with the spec).
    McpException
    Runtime exception carrying JSON-RPC error fields for mapping to JsonRpcError.
    McpMethods
    JSON-RPC method names used by MCP over HTTP.
    McpProtocol
    MCP protocol version strings carried in initialize requests and results.
    Prompt
    MCP prompt descriptor (prompts/list entry).
    PromptArgument
    Declared argument for an MCP prompt.
    PromptCapability
    Server capability flags for prompts.
    PromptMessage
    Single message line inside GetPromptResult.
    ReadResourceRequest
    Parameters for "resources/read".
    ReadResourceResult
    Result payload for "resources/read".
    Resource
    MCP resource descriptor (resources/list entry).
    ResourceCapability
    Server capability flags for resources.
    ResourceContents
    Polymorphic MCP resource body (text or base64 blob).
    Role
    Role for PromptMessage entries (MCP wire uses lowercase strings).
    RootsCapability
    Client roots capability.
    ServerCapabilities
    MCP server capability advertisement in InitializeResult.
    TextContent
    MCP text content block.
    TextResourceContents
    Text body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
    Tool
    MCP tool descriptor (tools/list entry).
    ToolCapability
    Server capability flags for tools.
